Cost Reduction Idea: Route the air filter bypass hose through the left of the engine assembly (left of the engine oil inlet) and thereby reduce 220mm in length.
Estimated Cost Savings:
The evaluation is done before teardown, the values will change after the costing,
1. Per meter cost of the hose - INR 300 (assumption)
2. The current string length of the hose - 614mm
3. The proposed string length after rerouting - 395mm
4. Length saved - 220mm
5. The estimated weight of the portion removed - 100g (assumption)
6. The estimated cost of the portion removed - INR 65.7 - 20% tolerance = INR 52.56
Proposal: Route the air filter bypass hose through the left of the engine assembly (left of the engine oil inlet) and thereby reduce 220mm in length.
